sobre-mi.title: About me
sobre-mi.texto_sobreMi:
DevSecOps with 7 years of experience in infrastructure and secure operations. I apply security at every layer: Linux/Windows system hardening, access control (IAM/RBAC), security scanning integrated into CI/CD pipelines, network segmentation, firewall configuration, and threat-detection-oriented monitoring.

Experienced in operating production environments on cloud (AWS) and on-premise with a security-first approach. I leverage agentic AI (Python + LLM APIs) to automate log analysis, anomaly detection, and real-time security workflows.

Hands-on experience in security assessments, pentesting, and vulnerability analysis for infrastructure hardening. Focused on transitioning into Security Engineer, Cloud Security, or DevSecOps roles within corporate environments.

items.summary: I integrate Docker and Kubernetes to manage containers, ensuring application portability and scalability. I implement CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and GitHub Actions to automate testing and deployments. I manage infrastructure with Terraform and AWS CloudFormation to maintain efficiency and security in cloud environments. I use Grafana, Logstash, Elasticsearch and Prometheus for monitoring and observability. I leverage Bash and Python in Linux environments to automate tasks and enhance operational efficiency throughout the development lifecycle.

Freelance security and infrastructure consulting for SMB clients in Argentina, focused on DevSecOps practices and security operations: security assessments and pentesting (Nmap/Masscan, Burp Suite/OWASP ZAP, Wireshark/tcpdump), hardening and operational security (controls on Linux/Windows, pfSense/iptables/Shorewall firewalls, least-privilege policies, secure VPNs), DevSecOps implementation (CI/CD with integrated security scanning, secure deployment automation, secrets management), secure infrastructure (Proxmox/VMware virtualization, anomaly-oriented monitoring, backup and incident recovery) and AI-powered automation with Python + LLM APIs.

I implemented and managed virtualized environments with Proxmox and VMware, administering 500+ Linux VMs in production. I configured routers, switches and firewalls (pfSense, MikroTik, Cisco), including VLANs, ACLs, VPNs, NAT and least-privilege firewall policies. I managed Docker containers with a focus on network security. I implemented monitoring with Zabbix and Graylog oriented toward security: failed login alerts, port scan detection, service anomalies and pfSense event correlation. I automated tasks with Bash, Python and PowerShell, and managed servers and storage (HP, Dell).

proyectos.title: Projects
proyectos.info-proyecto1: Personal site with terminal aesthetic, contact form, Node.js API and Mailtrap mail-service. Jenkins CI/CD, Docker Compose, production homelab deployment.
proyectos.info-proyecto2: Operations dashboard with links to monitoring (Uptime Kuma, Netdata), infrastructure (Proxmox, Jenkins) and homelab services. Docker deployment + CI/CD.
